findings.finding: Max IR approach outperforms equal weighting over 13yr backtest. Recalibrate monthly using 36-month rolling IC. IR = IC * sqrt(N). Diverse signal families monotonically improve performance.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. Our system uses equal voting. IC-weighted voting would amplify high-accuracy signals and suppress noise.

findings.finding: Regime-aware LightGBM + rolling HMM won IIT KGP Quant Games 2026 (Sharpe 2.276). Route between MR and TF per regime.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. We detect regimes but use static multipliers, not signal-subset selection.

findings.finding: Aggregate stats mask regime-dependent heterogeneity. Strict OOS testing critical.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. Our accuracy is all-time + 7d-recent. No formal walk-forward validation.

findings.finding: Bull vs Bear agents + risk oversight significantly improves Sharpe vs single-agent.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. Layer 2 is single-agent. Could add but latency cost in tight tier windows.

findings.finding: GRU outperforms LSTM for sub-3yr silver. CNN+LSTM hybrid MAPE <3%.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. Chronos-2 regressed on XAG. Dedicated GRU model could help.

findings.finding: MVRV Z-Score identifies cycle peaks within 2 weeks. On-chain outperforms price/vol by 15-20%.
findings.relevance_to_us: HIGH. On-chain at 60% (45 sam) promising but undersampled.

findings.finding: Trend-following + momentum works best in inflationary supply-shock regime.
findings.relevance_to_us: MEDIUM. Current environment. Could boost momentum weight in inflation regimes.

recommended_improvements.title: IC-weighted signal voting
recommended_improvements.description: Replace equal-weight with IC-weighted voting. Signal vote weight = rolling 30d IC.

recommended_improvements.title: Per-ticker signal gating
recommended_improvements.description: If signal X has <45% accuracy on ticker Y (30+ samples), force HOLD for that pair.

recommended_improvements.title: Fix funding rate horizon gate
recommended_improvements.description: Funding rate at 30.8% (1d) is harmful. Verify horizon gate enforced.

recommended_improvements.title: Regime-adaptive signal subsets
recommended_improvements.description: Select signal subsets per regime instead of static penalties.

recommended_improvements.title: Horizon-optimized signal weights
recommended_improvements.description: XAG better at 3d (57.4%) than 1d (49.7%). Use horizon-specific weights.
